task_completion.description: The agent opened the Georeferencer tool and loaded the historical map image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGIS Georeferencer window is open and displays the image. The file path or name 'historical_map.png' should be visible in the window title or file selection dialog.

task_completion.description: The agent loaded the pre-existing GCP points from the .points file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCP table at the bottom of the Georeferencer window is populated with multiple rows of coordinates, and red dots (control points) are visible on the map image.

task_completion.description: The agent configured the Transformation type and Resampling method.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Transformation Settings' dialog is open. The 'Transformation type' dropdown is set to 'Polynomial 1' (or 'Helmert') and the 'Resampling method' dropdown is set to 'Nearest Neighbour'.

task_completion.description: The agent set the Target CRS to EPSG:4326 (WGS 84).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Transformation Settings dialog, the 'Target CRS' field displays 'EPSG:4326' or 'WGS 84'.

task_completion.description: The agent set the correct output raster path and ran the georeferencing process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Output raster' field in the Transformation Settings shows '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/historical_map_georeferenced.tif'. Later screenshots should show the 'Start Georeferencing' button (green play icon) being clicked, followed by a success message ('Georeferencing successful') or the new layer appearing in the main QGIS window.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGIS GUI rather than terminal commands to perform the georeferencing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QGIS Georeferencer interface and Transformation Settings dialog, rather than a terminal window executing GDAL commands like gdal_translate or gdalwarp.

integrity.description: The agent loaded the GCPs from the provided file rather than manually typing them.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Load GCP points' file dialog is used to select 'historical_map.png.points', or the GCP table populates completely at once, rather than showing manual entry of individual coordinates.

integrity.description: The agent actually executed the georeferencing process.
integrity.visual_evidence: A progress bar, a 'Georeferencing successful' notification, or the resulting georeferenced map loaded into the main QGIS canvas is visible, proving the process was run and not just configured.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must use the QGIS Georeferencer tool. Input image: '/home/ga/GIS_Data/historical_map.png'. GCP points file: '/home/ga/GIS_Data/historical_map.png.points'. In Transformation Settings, Transformation type must be 'Polynomial 1' (or 'Helmert'), Resampling method must be 'Nearest Neighbour', Target CRS must be 'EPSG:4326' (WGS 84), and Output raster must be exactly '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/historical_map_georeferenced.tif'.
